meta.name: description
meta.content: Databyss is a non-commercial, open source application for taking notes, managing bibliographical sources, and publishing your work online.

sections.title: Plumb the depths.
sections.headline: Databyss is a non-commercial, open source application for taking notes, managing bibliographical sources, and publishing your work online.

sections.title: Your words belong to you.
sections.description: Databyss 3 is a native application that runs on MacOS and Windows. This means that your notes and data are truly yours, stored on your hard drive and 100% private.

sections.title: Share your work.
sections.description: Publish collections of your work to sharable URLs with a single click. Other Databyss users can then import your notes, topics and sources into their own Databyss. With 3 clicks 😉.
sections.lowerContent: Explore [a published Databyss collection](https://pub.databyss.app/chi-2025-y5ce5hb0b1kumy) to see what's possible.

sections.title: Manage and store your references.
sections.description: Keep track of all of your reference material and store your PDFs right in Databyss. Bibliographies and citations can be exported in all of the major styles.

sections.title: Search and discover.
sections.description: Databyss search reveals the connections between all of your notes, topics, sources, authors and collections.
